title: 6 Pieces Small Stainless Steel Spoons for Spice Jars, Mini Size, Cute Little Spice Spoons for Spices, Salt, Sugar, Fun Little Scoops, Gold
features: Package includes: 6 charming small stainless steel spoons. Sufficient quantity to meet your various needs

Very small size: 7.4 cm long, 1.5 cm wide. These tiny stainless steel spoons are lightweight yet sturdy. Reusable and durable. The spoon size is very small. Please check the provided measurements carefully to ensure they meet your requirements
Well made: This delightful small stainless steel spoon is crafted from stainless steel. They are well finished, very smooth and attractive. Perfect for your spice jars
Practical tools: Small spoons are ideal for scooping spices, sauces, salt, sugar, honey, pepper, etc. A handy tool for your friends, family, loved ones
Easy to clean and maintain: This silver metal scoop features an ergonomic design that makes it easy to clean and hold. We recommend hand washing and thorough drying before storage
